wordplay_note: His name is his situation — orbiting alone in a dangerous field
card_description: Walt Dangerfield (meaning "Dangerfield = field of danger") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Dr. Bloodmoney*. Astronaut stranded in orbit who becomes the world's DJ and cultural lifeline. Name note: His name is his situation — orbiting alone in a dangerous field. The voice from above — media as the last thread of civilization. First appears in *Dr. Bloodmoney*.

reference.brief: Astronaut stranded in orbit who becomes the world's DJ and cultural lifeline
reference.significance: The voice from above — media as the last thread of civilization
